flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at North Seattle College rose 27% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.1k → $15.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Seattle College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at North Seattle College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (39.8% → 32.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Seattle College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
